content.claim: International legal safeguards for segregation prevention (ECtHR 2013 judgment on special-school segregation, 2023 Piliscsaba village-school judgment) have not been effectively enforced domestically over a decade, as the Committee of Ministers monitoring has not closed the 2013 case despite repeated non-closure findings.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Implementation planning lens
limitations: Sources do not specify which domestic actors are responsible for non-implementation or what remedies have been attempted
Duration of non-closure does not necessarily indicate inadequacy of the safeguard mechanism itself, only weak implementation
No comparison to implementation timelines for ECtHR judgments in other EU member states provided
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
